cover.subtitle:
해방의 환호와 38선,
좌우 대립의 시작.
cover.imagePrompt: Contemporary Korean minimal illustration. Gray, red, blue simple palette. Suits, military uniforms, civilian clothing. Gwanghwamun, National Assembly, democracy plaza background. CENTER: a wide gray map silhouette of the Korean peninsula divided horizontally by a thick red dashed line at the middle. Above the line: a small Soviet soldier silhouette in winter coat. Below the line: a small American soldier silhouette in helmet. Small crowds of cheering Korean civilians (men in suits, women in white blouses) waving banners. Color: gray base + red dividing line + small blue accents. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 카이로 회담. '적당한 시기' 한국 독립 약속.

items.name: 안재홍
items.desc: 인공 선포에 반발, 우파 이탈 주도.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 카이로(독립 최초 약속), 얄타(소련 참전), 포츠담(카이로 재확인) 구분과 건준·인공·미군정의 시간 순서가 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small Korean peninsula silhouette with a thin red line at center. Cream #F5EFE4 base + amber #B45309 accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
